tasks.instruction: Choose the correct answer A, B or C.

items.stem: If it _________ tomorrow, we will stay at home and play board games.
We won't go to the park if the weather _________ bad.
If you _________ your homework now, you will have free time later.
What will you do if the teacher _________ give us any homework?
If she _________ hard, she will pass the English test.
They _________ be late if they don't leave soon.
